app.name: Clippo
state.ignore_next: The next copy will be ignored
paste.unavailable.title: Paste unavailable
paste.unavailable.permission.body: Clippo copied the selected item to the clipboard, but automatic paste needs an OS permission. Paste manually or open permission help.
paste.unavailable.focus.body: Clippo could not find a target app to paste into. Focus the destination app and try again.
paste.unavailable.generic.body: Clippo could not complete automatic paste. The selected item can still be copied and pasted manually.
settings.history_limit.title: History Limit
settings.history_limit.description: Set the maximum number of unpinned clipboard items Clippo keeps.
settings.max_item_bytes.title: Maximum Item Size
settings.max_item_bytes.description: Skip clipboard entries that are too large to keep the app responsive.
settings.clipboard_check_interval_ms.des: Control polling frequency on platforms that do not provide clipboard events.
settings.paste_automatically.title: Paste Automatically
settings.paste_automatically.description: Paste the selected history item into the focused app when permissions allow it.
settings.launch_at_login.title: Launch At Login
settings.launch_at_login.description: Start Clippo automatically after signing in.
settings.show_footer.title: Show Footer
settings.show_footer.description: Show or hide compact footer actions in the history popup.
settings.show_tray_or_menu_icon.title: Show Tray Or Menu Icon
settings.show_tray_or_menu_icon.descript: Show the native menu bar, tray, or desktop-shell entry point.
settings.appearance.title: Theme
settings.appearance.description: Use system, light, or dark appearance.
settings.shortcuts.open_history.title: Open History Shortcut
settings.shortcuts.open_history.descript: Set the global shortcut that opens the clipboard history popup.
settings.shortcuts.paste_selected.title: Paste Selected Shortcut
settings.shortcuts.paste_selected.descri: Set the shortcut for pasting the selected item.
settings.shortcuts.paste_without_formatt: Set the shortcut for pasting plain text from rich clipboard content.
settings.shortcuts.delete_selected.title: Delete Selected Shortcut
settings.shortcuts.delete_selected.descr: Set the shortcut for removing the selected item from history.
settings.shortcuts.pin_selected.title: Pin Selected Shortcut
settings.shortcuts.pin_selected.descript: Set the shortcut for pinning or unpinning the selected item.
settings.shortcuts.clear_unpinned.title: Clear Unpinned Shortcut
settings.shortcuts.clear_unpinned.descri: Set the shortcut for clearing regular history while keeping pinned items.
settings.shortcuts.clear_all.title: Clear All Shortcut
settings.shortcuts.clear_all.description: Set the shortcut for clearing the full clipboard history.
settings.shortcuts.open_preferences.desc: Set the shortcut that opens preferences.
settings.ignored_clipboard_types.title: Ignored Clipboard Types
settings.ignored_clipboard_types.descrip: Choose clipboard formats that should never be saved.
settings.ignored_applications.title: Ignored Applications
settings.ignored_applications.descriptio: Choose apps whose clipboard changes should be ignored where supported.
settings.ignored_content_patterns.title: Ignored Content Patterns
settings.ignored_content_patterns.descri: Choose text patterns that should be ignored for sensitive content.
onboarding.clipboard.title: Enable Clipboard Access
onboarding.clipboard.body: Clippo needs clipboard access to save local history.
onboarding.paste.title: Enable Automatic Paste
onboarding.paste.body: Automatic paste sends the paste command after you choose a history item.
onboarding.shortcut.title: Confirm Shortcut
onboarding.shortcut.body: Use the global shortcut to open Clippo from anywhere.
onboarding.privacy.title: Review Privacy Defaults
onboarding.privacy.body: Clippo stores history locally, skips sensitive formats where detectable, and has no telemetry by default.
onboarding.complete.title: Clippo Is Ready
onboarding.complete.body: You can now open history, search, copy, and paste using the configured shortcuts.
